success_factors: Workflow status is success end-to-end, with all expected nodes executed: download → analysis → env → generate → run → review → finalize.
Import-based adapter strategy was appropriate for dedupe (import feasibility 0.94, low intrusiveness risk).
Generated MCP service started healthy over stdio and passed plugin-level run validation.
Repository structure and core integration targets (dedupe.api classes, serializer, convenience utilities) were correctly identified.
failure_reasons: Validation depth is limited: original project tests show passed=false with empty details and execution_time=0, indicating tests were likely not executed.
Quality telemetry is incomplete (0 LOC/size/endpoints in generation metrics, empty performance metrics), reducing confidence in measured quality.
DeepWiki analysis failed, reducing external architectural/context enrichment.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully via zip fallback; no node-level timing provided, but download+prep appears stable.
node_performance.analysis_time: Analysis completed with medium complexity classification and useful module mapping; timing unavailable per node.
node_performance.generation_time: Generation succeeded with expected MCP file set and import adapter; no per-node duration reported.
node_performance.test_time: Plugin health checks passed, but test rigor is low due to absent/empty test execution artifacts.
